continuity.ai_briefing: You are receiving a Continuity handoff. Read this entire file before responding. The previous AI (claude) switched because: end of session. Last session summary: built and deployed full voice biometrics layer — speaker ID + health/emotional signal analytics. APK installed on device. commit 2433018. XPRIZE requirements B and D substantially complete, A and C remain open.. Current task: Haven voice biometrics integration. There are 1 open question(s) that need resolution. Read the operator_manual section — it tells you exactly how to work with this human.

operator_manual.note: Read before writing any code or making any suggestions.
operator_manual.patching: Full files only. Use cat <<'EOF' heredoc. Never partial snippets.
operator_manual.workflow: Architecture first. Explain reasoning before code. One task at a time.
operator_manual.communication: Terse. No filler. Push back on bad ideas. Direct. Read typos as intent.
operator_manual.tools: WSL2/Ubuntu, Dell Inspiron, Python venvs, Node nvm, Railway backend, wireless ADB Android

current_state.goal: The goal is continuity of reasoning across multiple AI systems.

ai_notes.note: model: claude-sonnet-4-6 task: Haven voice biometrics integration stopped_at: voice biometrics committed — AudioCaptureManager, SpeakerIdentifier, VoiceAnalyzer, VoiceContext, VoiceProfile, VoiceProfileDao, VoiceProfileManager, HavenDatabase all merged and pushed next: wire VoiceContext into Railway api.py so backend consumes voice_context and adjusts Haven system prompt and routing accordingly open: does Cloud Run need VPC connector to reach Railway DB? switching_because: end of session summary: built and deployed full voice biometrics layer — speaker ID + health/emotional signal analytics. APK installed on device. commit 2433018. XPRIZE requirements B and D substantially complete, A and C remain open.
Stopped at: voice biometrics committed — AudioCaptureManager, SpeakerIdentifier, VoiceAnalyzer, VoiceContext, VoiceProfile, VoiceProfileDao, VoiceProfileManager, HavenDatabase all merged and pushed
Next: wire VoiceContext into Railway api.py so backend consumes voice_context and adjusts Haven system prompt and routing accordingly
git add -A && git commit -m "feat: voice biometrics - speaker ID, voice analytics, VoiceContext routing" && git push

# Relationship Layer
## Purpose
This project uses a three-layer continuity architecture.
1. Engineer Layer - code - git state - tasks - goals - project facts
2. Developer Profile - how the developer prefers to work - collaboration preferences - communication style
3. Relationship Layer - shared reasoning across AI systems - design intent - open questions - notes between AI contributors
## Current Understanding
The goal is not merely project memory.
The goal is continuity of reasoning across multiple AI systems.
A future AI should assume: - this is a continuation - not a fresh conversation - prior decisions should be respected unless challenged with evidence
## Notes From GPT
The current Continuity system successfully captures project state.
The next evolution should add:
- developer profile export - relationship layer export - AI-to-AI notes - open loop tracking - reasoning history
This would allow GPT, Claude, and future models to continue work with minimal context rebuilding.
## Open Questions
- Should developer profile be global (~/.continuity/)? - How should AI notes be merged? - Should reasoning logs be append-only? - Should handoff output contain all three layers by default?

open_questions.question: does Cloud Run need VPC connector to reach Railway DB?

cb4b92c continuity: add GPT relationship layer notes
